creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Port net/samba43 fails to build. It depends on  p5-Parse-Pidl>=4.3.1, but FreeBSD's port has only version p5-Parse-Pidl-4.1.21_1. So samba 4.3 is not able to be built.



[...]

===>   samba43-4.3.1 depends on package: p5-Parse-Pidl>=4.3.1 - not found
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/net/samba43
*** Error code 1
